summary: Lifecycle type coupling reduced: result, path, plugin state, manifest, plan, doctor, bootstrap, profile-check, and context-export types now live in domain files; internal source imports those domain files directly, and module-boundary tests keep lifecycle.ts as a compatibility re-export only.

sources.label: opennori-self-lifecycle-types-domain-split
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/module-boundaries.test.js test/mcp.test.ts test/cli-lifecycle.test.js
sources.command: npx vitest run test/module-boundaries.test.js test/mcp.test.ts test/cli-lifecycle.test.js

reviewability: Review src/types/*.ts, internal import paths, and the lifecycle type boundary guard in test/module-boundaries.test.js.
limitations: src/types/lifecycle.ts intentionally remains as a compatibility re-export; it should not be used by internal source.
